name: Vertical timeline

en.when_to_use: Use it when milestones, delivery plans, or event histories need date anchors and a clear top-to-bottom narrative, such as release plans, project minutes, and fulfillment progress. For very dense events requiring zoom, drag, or rescheduling, use a dedicated timeline/Gantt; for undated steps, use a process or step list.
en.why_valuable: Heavy timeline libraries are often too costly for a lightweight delivery list; this template represents single dates and date ranges with a stable date column, continuous track, status nodes, description cards, and metadata tags while wrapping naturally on mobile.

data_in.note: data.events is a date-event collection in display order; the component does not sort automatically. date/endDate should preferably be YYYY-MM-DD but may be any Date-parseable string; unparseable values display verbatim. status defaults to upcoming and determines the track point and status pill; meta contains short tags at the bottom of the event card.

schema.title?: string -- timeline title; displays "Timeline" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- time range or delivery context; displays event count when omitted
schema.events: {date:string,endDate?:string,title:string,description?:string,status?:'done'|'current'|'at-risk'|'issue'|'upcoming',icon?:string,meta?:string[]}[] -- ordered events; endDate forms a range, icon is a short character/emoji, and meta contains short tags

spec.note: Grows with event count; desktop uses date/track/content columns, and below 560px the date moves above the card. No vh or carrier-size measurement.

when_to_use: 需要按日期锚定、从上到下讲清里程碑、交付计划或事件经过时用它：适合发布计划、项目纪要和履约进度。事件密度很高、需要缩放拖拽或改期时用专业时间轴/Gantt；只讲无日期步骤时用流程或步骤列表。
why_valuable: 重型 timeline 库对轻量交付清单往往代价过高；本模板用稳定的日期栏、连续轨道、状态节点、说明卡和元数据标签表达单日与日期区间，同时保持移动端自然折行。

data_in.note: data.events 是按展示顺序给出的日期事件集合；组件不自动排序。date/endDate 推荐 YYYY-MM-DD，也接受可被 Date 解析的字符串；无法解析时原样展示。status 默认 upcoming，决定轨道点与状态 pill；meta 是事件卡底部的短标签。

schema.title?: string —— 时间线标题；省略时显示 “Timeline”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 时间范围或交付背景；省略时显示事件数
schema.events: {date:string,endDate?:string,title:string,description?:string,status?:'done'|'current'|'at-risk'|'issue'|'upcoming',icon?:string,meta?:string[]}[] —— 顺序事件；endDate 形成区间，icon 是短字符/emoji，meta 是短标签

spec.note: 按事件数量自动增高；桌面为日期/轨道/内容三列，560px 以下日期移到卡片上方。无 vh 和载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 用一次产品发布计划展示已完成、当前、风险中和即将开始四种状态，并同时覆盖单日事件、日期区间、图标和元数据。

minimal.title: Atlas 2.0 launch plan
minimal.subtitle: Six-week path from design freeze to public release

events.title: Design freeze
events.description: Core navigation, empty states, and launch visuals approved.

events.title: Release candidate build
events.description: QA is validating migration paths and the new permissions model.

events.title: Security review
events.description: External review is booked; two dependency updates still need evidence.

events.title: Public launch
events.description: Roll out to all workspaces with docs, changelog, and support coverage.

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
